Off Calendar Jan-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion For Award Of Post Judgment Attorney's Fees is granted in the amount of $1,830. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jul-12-2007 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgement Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-25-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Off Calendar Jul-10-2006 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
